FMUSFGFACTS1A: Individual actual-posting line items feeding the Funds Management US Federal Government facts data set.
FMUSFGFACTS1T: Aggregated actual and plan totals for the Funds Management US Federal Government facts data, keyed by ledger, version and fiscal year.
FMUSFGFACTS2A: Individual actual-posting line items feeding a second Funds Management US Federal Government facts data set.
FMUSFGFACTS2T: Aggregated actual and plan totals for a second Funds Management US Federal Government facts data set, keyed by ledger, version and fiscal year.
S021: Logistics information system statistics on production order items by material, plant and posting period.
S022: Logistics information system statistics on production order operations by work center, plant and posting period.
S023: Logistics information system totals records for materials, summarized by plant and MRP controller.
S024: Logistics information system totals records for work centers, summarized by plant and production scheduler.
S025: Logistics information system statistics on run schedules, linking materials, production versions and orders.
S026: Logistics information system statistics on component material usage against production orders.
S028: Logistics information system statistics on reporting point confirmations for materials and production orders.
S061: Plant maintenance information system data on technical object location and planning, covering functional locations, equipment and planner groups.
S062: Plant maintenance information system data classifying technical objects by class, manufacturer and year of construction.
S063: Plant maintenance statistics analyzing damage causes and codes recorded against equipment and functional locations, grouped by notification type.
S064: Plant maintenance statistics on damage analysis for individual pieces of equipment or functional locations.
S065: Plant maintenance information system statistics summarizing technical objects by class, manufacturer and year of construction.
S070: Plant maintenance statistics on equipment and functional location breakdowns, aggregated by object class.
S076: Statistical data for sales and operations planning within the logistics information system.
S111: Index linking subsequent settlement (rebate) condition records to the billing documents and periods they apply to.
S114: Fleet management statistics analyzing vehicle consumption by equipment type, manufacturer and year of construction.
S115: Plant maintenance statistics evaluating costs by order type, maintenance activity type and technical object.
S116: Plant maintenance statistics analyzing service activity by customer, sales area and technical object.
S225: Statistics on goods receipts posted in repetitive manufacturing, linked to material, production version and sales order.
S227: Product cost statistics for repetitive manufacturing, broken down by material, component and activity type.
WBASSOC: Global Trade Services table linking source and target documents across process steps, such as requirement and activity documents.
WCOCOF: Document flow linking condition contracts to their settlement documents, one row per condition item and step.
